1.name: A Sending of Serpents
1.description: Cause a target to hallucinate being attacked by snakes.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 26-27

1.name: Beauty Fades
1.description: Cause a work of art to cause revulsion in those who view it.
references: Blood Magic: Secrets of Thaumaturgy Pg. 116-117

1.name: Bestowment of Scales
1.description: Heal a ghoul faster by growing scaled skin across their wounds

1.name: First Taste
1.description: Create a pleasurable association with a minor, repetitive action.
references: Blood Magic: Secrets of Thaumaturgy Pg. 116
Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 14

1.name: Hand of Ptah
1.description: Remotely damage or repair to an object of 200 lbs or less
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 25-26

1.name: Laborer
1.description: Create a simple servant for manual labor.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 27-28

1.name: Remove one point of temporary Willpower from the victim, and one dot from their Willpower rating.
Serpentine Sense
1.description: Gain ability to identify poisons and see in darkness.
references: Cairo by Night Pg. 88

1.name: Sight of the Jackal
1.description: Become aware of wraiths around you
references: Tome of Secrets Pg. 65-67

1.name: Whispers of the Sands
1.description: Communicate remotely with one's childer or ghouls.
references: Libellus Sanguinis 3: Wolves at the Door Pg. 105-106

2.name: Cross-Addiction
2.description: Temporarily change what an addict is fixated on.
references: Blood Magic: Secrets of Thaumaturgy Pg. 116
Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 14

2.name: Darkness of Duat
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 26-27

2.name: From the victim remove one point of temporary Willpower, and one dot from their Morality rating.
Hand of Khnum
2.description: Remotely damage or repair an animal, mortal, or objects of 1000 lbs or less
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 25-26

2.name: Scaleskin
references: Cairo by Night Pg. 88

2.name: Servitor
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 27-28

2.name: Tongue of the Tempter
2.description: Cause a subject to reveal a secret fear or desire.
references: Libellus Sanguinis 3: Wolves at the Door Pg. 105-106

2.name: Trust Withers
2.description: Target begins to believe a friend or ally is planning to betray him.
references: Blood Magic: Secrets of Thaumaturgy Pg. 116-117

2.name: Weigh the Virtues
2.description: Learn about crimes or heroic deeds of a dead or undead
references: Tome of Secrets Pg. 65-67

3.name: From the victim remove one point of temporary Willpower, and one dot from their Self
Guard
3.description: Create a servant capable of combat.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 27-28

3.name: Hand of Anubis
3.description: Remotely damage or repair corporeal supernatural creatures or objects of 5,000 lbs or less
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 25-26

3.name: Love Dies
3.description: Destroy a subject's feelings of love for another.
references: Blood Magic: Secrets of Thaumaturgy Pg. 116-117

3.name: Pharaoh's Sentry
3.description: Bind a fragment of a wraith into a corpse to act out one single command.
references: Tome of Secrets Pg. 65-67

3.name: Suffocation of the Tomb
3.description: Render victim unable to speak or breathe.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 26-27

3.name: Swallow the Tail
3.description: Draw shed blood from your surroundings to you

3.name: The Jones
3.description: Remove a subject's inhibitions from indulging their addiction.
references: Blood Magic: Secrets of Thaumaturgy Pg. 116
Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 14

3.name: Venom Curse
3.description: Turn one's blood into a poison that blinds.
references: Cairo by Night Pg. 88

3.name: Voice of the Prophet
3.description: Deliver a cryptic message that speaks to a listener's deepest desires.
references: Libellus Sanguinis 3: Wolves at the Door Pg. 105-106

4.name: Cycle of the Midgard Serpent
4.description: Grant a ghoul the ability to use your disciplines

4.name: Fatal Compulsion
4.description: Cause a target to suffer harm from not indulging their addiction.
references: Blood Magic: Secrets of Thaumaturgy Pg. 116
Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 14

4.name: From the victim remove one point of temporary Willpower, and choose their new Demeanor.
Hand of Thoth
4.description: Remotely damage or repair incorporeal supernatural creatures or objects of 20,000 lbs or less
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 25-26

4.name: Hope Dissolves
4.description: Cause a subject to become depressed, believing their goals cannot be obtained.
references: Blood Magic: Secrets of Thaumaturgy Pg. 116-117

4.name: Imbue with the Grace of Anubis
4.description: Reanimate a corpse and imbue it with a singular purpose tied to its virtuous or villainous deeds
references: Tome of Secrets Pg. 65-67

4.name: Lord of Storms
references: Libellus Sanguinis 3: Wolves at the Door Pg. 105-106

4.name: Overseer
4.description: Create a skilled servant that can supervise others.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 27-28

4.name: The Narrow House
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 26-27

4.name: Touch of Typhon
4.description: Transform one's arm into a venomous snake.
references: Cairo by Night Pg. 88

5.name: Apep's Transformation
5.description: Transform a ghoul of yours into a great serpent capable of understanding human speech

5.name: Consignment to Duat
5.description: Slay a mortal or put a vampire into torpor .
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 26-27

5.name: Dark Invocation
5.description: Place a protective curse on an object or place.
references: Libellus Sanguinis 3: Wolves at the Door Pg. 105-106

5.name: Form of the Hydra
5.description: Transform into a mass of snakes nearly impossible to destroy.
references: Cairo by Night Pg. 88

5.name: From the victim remove one point of temporary Willpower, and choose their new Nature.
Gift of Khnum
5.description: Create a servant that thinks for itself but is utterly loyal.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 27-28

5.name: Hand of Heka
5.description: Remotely apply a Discipline or other magical power to creatures or damage or repair objects of 100,000 lbs or less
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 25-26

5.name: Temperance
5.description: Render subject unable to draw pleasure from their addiction.
references: Blood Magic: Secrets of Thaumaturgy Pg. 116
Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 14

5.name: The Sorcery of Life
5.description: A toned-down version of the Bane Rite , the sorcerer creates a sort of proto- Bane Mummy
references: Tome of Secrets Pg. 65-67

5.name: Thrones Crumble
5.description: Create mistrust and hostility in a subject towards a figure of authority.
references: Blood Magic: Secrets of Thaumaturgy Pg. 116-117
